claim_gate.reason: The source gives a high-leverage conditional route, but every implemented polynomial explicit-candidate baseline has inadequate coverage and no structural partial solver has been constructed.

enumeration_certificates.statement: Enumerating at most n^6 explicit subsets covers at most n^6/2^n of uniform targets before collisions, below n^-2=0.000244141 at this n=64.
Enumerating at most n^6 explicit subsets covers at most n^6/2^n of uniform targets before collisions, below n^-2=6.10352e-05 at this n=128.
Enumerating at most n^6 explicit subsets covers at most n^6/2^n of uniform targets before collisions, below n^-2=1.52588e-05 at this n=256.
Enumerating at most n^6 explicit subsets covers at most n^6/2^n of uniform targets before collisions, below n^-2=3.8147e-06 at this n=512.
Enumerating at most n^6 explicit subsets covers at most n^6/2^n of uniform targets before collisions, below n^-2=9.53674e-07 at this n=1024.

falsifiers_triggered: A full normalized-fiber PGM is sufficient but not necessary; Regev's partial deterministic subset-sum solver already gives a conditional route.
Solving every subset-sum target is unnecessary; inverse-polynomial coverage of legal random instances suffices.
Enumerating polynomially many candidate subsets has exponentially small uniform-target coverage and cannot meet the source contract.
Meet-in-the-middle supplies an exact control but remains exponential in n=log2 N.
Explicit target-independent shared-seed randomness is interface-compatible, but this theorem supplies no solver.
An arbitrary quantum witness relation can leave orthogonal which-path workspaces and is not interface-compatible without an overlap theorem.
Randomized or quantum witness generators need a new coherent-consistency reduction before inheriting Regev's theorem.

primary_source_contract.conditional_consequence: the reversible matching routines recover d in poly(log N) time under DCP failure parameter f=1
primary_source_contract.important_scope: a partial solver suffices; uniform all-fiber preparation and solving every target are not required
primary_source_contract.instance_distribution: uniform A=(a_1,...,a_r), target t in Z_N, with r=log2 N+O(1)
primary_source_contract.legal_input: there exists B subseteq [r] with sum_{i in B} a_i=t mod N
primary_source_contract.solver_requirement: deterministic polynomial-time S(A,t) answers an inverse-polynomial fraction of legal inputs and otherwise returns error
primary_source_contract.source_locator: cs/0304005 quantum_average.tex lines 700-1065, subset-sum assumption through final DCP decoder

solver_routes.access_and_output: random A in Z_N^(n+O(1)), target t; output one valid subset or error
solver_routes.bridge_status: primary-source sufficient for polynomial f=1 DCP when inverse-polynomial legal coverage holds
solver_routes.remaining_obligation: Construct a uniform poly(n)-time solver with inverse-polynomial legal-input coverage.

solver_routes.access_and_output: coherently evaluate the deterministic partial function S(A,t) and uncompute workspace
solver_routes.remaining_obligation: Charge reversible implementation, matching search, repetitions, and complete d recovery.

solver_routes.access_and_output: R(A,t;r) is a valid-witness-or-error deterministic function for each explicit target-independent seed; the same coherent seed register is shared across paired endpoints
solver_routes.bridge_status: conditional interface extension proved by the coherent matching audit
solver_routes.remaining_obligation: Construct a uniform poly(n)-time solver with inverse-polynomial average legal coverage and reversible fixed-seed evaluation.

solver_routes.access_and_output: solver emits target-dependent witness amplitudes or garbage without an explicit shared-seed decomposition
solver_routes.bridge_status: not implied by the deterministic or shared-seed theorem
solver_routes.remaining_obligation: Prove canonical coherent witness selection or balanced paired amplitudes with inverse-polynomial workspace overlap and reversible erasure.

solver_routes.access_and_output: coherently map every normalized exact-sum fiber to its residue
solver_routes.bridge_status: sufficient but stronger than Regev's partial-solver route
solver_routes.remaining_obligation: Do not require this stronger primitive if a partial deterministic solver suffices.

solver_routes.access_and_output: test polynomially many low-weight, contiguous, or sampled subsets
solver_routes.remaining_obligation: A survivor must compute witnesses structurally rather than list polynomially many candidates.
solver_routes.resource_status: polynomial but exponentially small random-target coverage

summary: Audited 126 partial subset-sum baseline rows. Source-contract satisfying polynomial rows=0; asymptotic explicit-enumeration no-go certificates=5/5.
